subject: [PATCH v2 10/14] mm/pagemap: add PAGE_IS_ACCESSED for RWP tracking

2026-05-14.patch_summary: This patch adds a new category, PAGE_IS_ACCESSED, to track read-write protection (RWP) in the pagemap. It introduces a new bit in the PTE that is used to indicate whether a page has been accessed or written to, depending on the VMA's registered mode. The patch also updates the UAPI and documentation to reflect this change, ensuring that RWP and write-protected (WP) signals are distinct and scoped to their respective VMAs.
